reviews.review_description:
Looks like it could be a fun game, except on loading the turret is pointing to the right of my field of view and as such I can't shoot, because the turret turns with my head.

Also the LH joystick forwarded and backwards turns the tank and left on as right drive it forward and backwards.

I have not found any way to reconfigure the controls or the view, so it is unplayable.

Any help would be appreciated.
I'm on a quest 3

reviews.review_title: It’s not WOT, don’t buy it
reviews.review_description:
I purchased the game. 
First. Struggling with downloading.
Second. Struggling with handling 
Third. I didn’t even play. Just can’t 
Forth. World of Tanks has nothing about this game

Got this game yesterday and all it does is go to a dark screen after the initial splash screen with the company's logo is done.  I know some games have to boot up but I'm waiting there for what seems to be an eternity.
